news.title: Open source memory layer so any AI agent can do what Claude.ai and ChatGPT do
news.description: Give any AI agent a persistent memory in minutes. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Ollama, OpenRouter, and any MCP-compatible agent. Open source, self-hosted, model-agnostic.

news.title: $40 Billion from Google. $25 Billion from Amazon. Anthropic is now the most fought-over AI company on Earth
news.description: Google has committed up to $40 billion to Anthropic, days after Amazon pledged $25 billion, confirming the Claude maker as the AI industry's most coveted startup.

news.title: Understanding The Psychology Of The Grim-Keeping Dating Trend By Getting Personal Advice From AI Such As ChatGPT
news.description: New trend for dating is grim-keeping. People are looking to date someone with the same hatreds and dislikes. This is dicey. Use AI to help. An AI Insider scoop.
